## Annotation {.tabset}

### FeaturePlot CITE-seq + RNA {.tabset}

```{r CD4 FeaturePlot ADT}
dict <- list(
  "CD16-TotalSeqB" = "FCGR3A",
  "CD335-NKp46-TotalSeqB" = "NCR1",
  "CD197-CCR7-TotalSeqB" = "CCR7",
  "CD4-TotalSeqB" = "CD4",
  "CD8a-TotalSeqB" = "CD8A",
  "CD45RA-TotalSeqB" = "PTPRC",
  "CD62L-TotalSeqB" = "SELL",
  "CD127-IL-7Ra-TotalSeqB" = "IL7R",
  "CD25-TotalSeqB" = "IL2RA",
  "TIGIT-VSTM3-TotalSeqB" = "TIGIT",
  "CD226-DNAM-1-TotalSeqB" = "CD226",
  "CD38-TotalSeqB" = "CD38"
)

dir.create(
  file.path(DIR_RESULT,
            "CD4_Tcells",
            "FeaturePlot",
            "Prot_RNA_Clusters_FeaturePlot"),
  recursive = TRUE,
  showWarnings = FALSE)

for (prot in names(dict)) {
  gene <- dict[[prot]]
  
  # ADT plot
  DefaultAssay(seu_CD4_QC_Moderate) <- "ADT"
  p1 <- FeaturePlot(seu_CD4_QC_Moderate, features = prot, reduction = "umap") + ggtitle(paste0(prot, " (ADT)"))
  
  # RNA plot
  DefaultAssay(seu_CD4_QC_Moderate) <- "RNA"
  # Vérifie que le gène existe dans RNA
  if (gene %in% rownames(seu_CD4_QC_Moderate[["RNA"]])) {
    p2 <- FeaturePlot(seu_CD4_QC_Moderate, features = gene, reduction = "umap") + ggtitle(paste0(gene, " (RNA)"))
  } else {
    p2 <- ggplot() + 
      ggtitle(paste0(gene, " (RNA) - Not found")) + 
      theme_void()
  }
  
  p3 <- DimPlot(
    seu_CD4_QC_Moderate, 
    reduction = "umap", 
    group.by = "seurat_clusters") + 
    ggtitle("seurat_clusters") +
    scale_color_manual(values = pal)
  
  # Combine plots
  p <- (p1 | p2) / p3
  p

  # Sauvegarde
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(
      DIR_RESULT,
      "CD4_Tcells",
      "FeaturePlot",
      "Prot_RNA_Clusters_FeaturePlot",
      paste0("Prot_RNA_Clusters_FeaturePlot_", prot, "_", gene, "_featureplot.png")),
    plot = p,
    width = 12,
    height = 12)
}
```

### Clusters markers {.tabset}

#### Find all markers {.tabset}

```{r CD4 FindAllMarkers}
Idents(seu_CD4_QC_Moderate) <- "seurat_clusters"


markers <- FindAllMarkers(
  seu_CD4_QC_Moderate, 
  test.use = "wilcox",
  assay = "SCT",
  slot = "data",
  only.pos = FALSE, 
  min.pct = 0.25,
  # latent.vars = c("nCount_RNA", "emulsion", "percent.mt", "Phase"),
  verbose = TRUE,
  random.seed = 42)

markers_filt <- markers %>%
  filter(
    p_val_adj < 0.05,
    avg_log2FC > 0.5,
    !grepl("^MT-|^RPL|^RPS", gene)
  )
```

##### Top 10 markers per cluster {.tabset}

```{r CD4 Top10 markers}
genes.scaled <- rownames(seu_CD4_QC_Moderate[["RNA"]]@scale.data)

top10 <- markers_filt %>%
  filter(gene %in% genes.scaled) %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  slice_max(avg_log2FC, n = 10)

top10 %>% arrange(cluster, desc(avg_log2FC))
```

#### Visualize

##### FeaturePlot of top10 markers per cluster {.tabset}

```{r CD4 FeaturePlot Top10}
dir.create(
  file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "CD4_Tcells",
    "FeaturePlot",
    "Top10_Markers_Per_Cluster"),
  recursive = TRUE,
  showWarnings = FALSE)

for (i in unique(top10$cluster)) {
  
  dir.create(
    file.path(
      DIR_RESULT,
      "CD4_Tcells",
      "FeaturePlot",
      "Top10_Markers_Per_Cluster",
      paste0("Cluster_", i)),
    recursive = TRUE,
    showWarnings = FALSE
  )

  genes_cluster <- top10 %>%
    filter(cluster == i) %>%
    pull(gene)

  p_list <- lapply(genes_cluster, function(gene) {
    FeaturePlot(
      seu_CD4_QC_Moderate,
      features = gene, 
      reduction = "umap") +
      # scale_color_gradient(low = "lightgrey", high = "red") +
      ggtitle(paste0("Cluster ", i, ": ", gene))
  })

  p_combined <- wrap_plots(p_list, ncol = 5)
  p_combined
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(
      DIR_RESULT,
      "CD4_Tcells",
      "FeaturePlot",
      "Top10_Markers_Per_Cluster",
      paste0("Cluster_", i),
      paste0("Cluster_", i, "_Top10_Markers_featureplot.png")),
    plot = p_combined,
    width = 20,
    height = 12)
  
  lapply(genes_cluster, function(gene) {
    
    dir.create(
      file.path(
        DIR_RESULT,
        "CD4_Tcells",
        "FeaturePlot",
        "Top10_Markers_Per_Cluster",
        paste0("Cluster_", i),
        paste0("Gene_", gene)),
      recursive = TRUE,
      showWarnings = FALSE)
      
    violin <- VlnPlot(
      seu_CD4_QC_Moderate, 
      cols = pal,
      features = gene, 
      group.by = "seurat_clusters", 
      pt.size = 0) +
      ggtitle(paste0("Cluster ", i, ": ", gene))
    violin
      
    ggsave(
      plot = violin,
      filename = file.path(
        DIR_RESULT,
        "CD4_Tcells",
        "FeaturePlot",
        "Top10_Markers_Per_Cluster",
        paste0("Cluster_", i),
        paste0("Gene_", gene),
        paste0("Cluster_", i, "_", gene, "_VlnPlot.png")
      ),
      width = 6,
      height = 4)
      
    feature <- FeaturePlot(
      seu_CD4_QC_Moderate, 
      features = gene, 
      reduction = "umap") +
      ggtitle(paste0("Cluster ", i, ": ", gene))
    feature
    
    ggsave(
      filename = file.path(
        DIR_RESULT,
        "CD4_Tcells",
        "FeaturePlot",
        "Top10_Markers_Per_Cluster",
        paste0("Cluster_", i),
        paste0("Gene_", gene),
        paste0("Cluster_", i, "_", gene, "_FeaturePlot.png")
      ),
      plot = feature,
      width = 6,
      height = 5)
      
    p_cluster <- DimPlot(
      seu_CD4_QC_Moderate, 
      reduction = "umap", 
      group.by = "seurat_clusters") +
      scale_color_manual(values = pal)
    p_cluster
      
    p_violin_feature_cluster <- (violin | feature) / p_cluster
    p_violin_feature_cluster
      
    ggsave(
      filename = file.path(
        DIR_RESULT,
        "CD4_Tcells",
        "FeaturePlot",
        "Top10_Markers_Per_Cluster",
        paste0("Cluster_", i),
        paste0("Gene_", gene),
        paste0("Cluster_", i, "_", gene, "_Vln_Feature_Cluster.png")
      ),
      plot = p_violin_feature_cluster,
      width = 12,
      height = 10)
  })
}
```

##### Heatmap of markers per cluster {.tabset}

```{r CD4 Heatmap Top10}
genes <- unique(top10$gene)

# Extract scaled data for the selected genes
mat <- GetAssayData(
  seu_CD4_QC_Moderate,
  assay = "SCT",
  layer = "scale.data"
)[genes, ]

# Order cells by cluster
clusters <- seu_CD4_QC_Moderate$seurat_clusters
ord <- order(clusters)

mat <- mat[, ord]
clusters <- clusters[ord]

# Create annotation for clusters
cluster_ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  Cluster = clusters,
  col = list(
    Cluster = structure(
      Seurat::DiscretePalette(length(unique(clusters)), "polychrome"),
      names = levels(clusters)
    )
  )
)
# Create heatmap
heatmap <- Heatmap(
  mat,
  name = "Expression",
  top_annotation = cluster_ha,
  show_column_names = FALSE,
  show_row_names = TRUE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  row_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 8),
  column_title = "Top 10 markers per cluster"
  )
heatmap


# Save heatmap
dir.create(
  file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "CD4_Tcells",
    "Heatmap"),
  recursive = TRUE,
  showWarnings = FALSE)

pdf(
  file = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "CD4_Tcells",
    "Heatmap",
    "Top10_Markers_Per_Cluster_Heatmap.pdf"
  ),
  width = 12,
  height = 10
)

draw(heatmap)

dev.off()


png(
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "CD4_Tcells",
    "Heatmap",
    "Top10_Markers_Per_Cluster_Heatmap.png"
  ),
  width = 2000,
  height = 1600,
  res = 300
)

draw(heatmap)

dev.off()

```

##### Volcano plot of markers per cluster {.tabset}

```{r CD4 Volcano plot Top10}
# Volcano plot for each cluster
dir.create(
  file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "CD4_Tcells",
    "Annotation",
    "Volcano_Plots"),
  recursive = TRUE,
  showWarnings = FALSE)


for (i in unique(top10$cluster)) {

  df <- markers %>%
    filter(cluster == i) %>%
    mutate(
      Status = case_when(
        p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC >  0.5 ~ "Up",
        p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < -0.5 ~ "Down",
        TRUE ~ "NS"
      )
    )

  # Top genes à annoter
  top_up <- df %>%
  filter(Status == "Up") %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_log2FC)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)

  top_down <- df %>%
    filter(Status == "Down") %>%
    arrange(avg_log2FC) %>%   # plus négatif en premier
    slice_head(n = 10)

  top_genes <- bind_rows(top_up, top_down)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(avg_log2FC, -log10(p_val_adj))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = Status), size = 1, alpha = 0.7) +

    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.5, 0.5), linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +

    geom_text_repel(
      data = top_genes,
      aes(label = gene),
      size = 3,
      max.overlaps = Inf
    ) +

    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "Up"   = "#D62728",
        "Down" = "#1F77B4",
        "NS"   = "grey70"
      )
    ) +

    labs(
      title = paste("Volcano plot – Cluster", i),
      subtitle = "DE genes vs rest",
      x = "avg log2FC",
      y = "-log10(adj p-value)",
      color = "Regulation"
    ) +

    theme_classic(base_size = 12)

  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(
      DIR_RESULT,
      "CD4_Tcells",
      "Annotation",
      "Volcano_Plots",
      paste0("Volcano_Cluster_", i, ".png")
    ),
    plot = p,
    width = 8,
    height = 6,
    dpi = 300
  )
}
```


### Automatic annotation (SingleR) {.tabset}

#### Make automatic predictions {.tabset}

```{r CD4 Run auto annot (SingleR)}
# Prepare SingleR input
sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(seu_CD4_QC_Moderate, assay = "RNA")

# Reference dataset
ref <- fetchReference("monaco_immune", "2024-02-26")

pred_l2 <- SingleR(
  test = sce,
  ref = ref,
  # cluster = seu_CD4_QC_Moderate$seurat_clusters,
  labels = ref$label.main)

pred_l3 <- SingleR(
  test = sce,
  ref = ref,
  # cluster = seu_CD4_QC_Moderate$seurat_clusters,
  labels = ref$label.fine)



seu_CD4_QC_Moderate$predicted.celltype.l2_CD4_jordan <- pred_l2$pruned.labels
seu_CD4_QC_Moderate$predicted.celltype.l3_CD4_jordan <- pred_l3$pruned.labels
```

### Manual annotation {.tabset}

#### Create my celltype signatures {.tabset}

##### Run presto to find markers {.tabset}

```{r CD4 Run presto}
expr_matrix <- as.matrix(seu_CD4_QC_Moderate@assays$RNA@data)
labels <- seu_CD4_QC_Moderate$seurat_clusters

presto_markers <- wilcoxauc(expr_matrix, labels)
```

##### Construction of the signature table {.tabset}

```{r CD4 Construct signature tibble}
signature_tbl <- tribble(
  ~feature, ~cell_type, ~class,
  
  # Activated
  "CD69", "Activated", "State",
  "TNFRSF9", "Activated", "State",
  "IL2RA", "Activated", "State",

  # Apoptotic / stress
  "MALAT1", "Apoptotic", "State",
  "NEAT1", "Apoptotic", "State",

  # CD4 lineage
  "CD3D", "CD4", "Identity",
  "CD3E", "CD4", "Identity",
  "CD4",  "CD4", "Identity",
  "TRBC1","CD4", "Identity",

  # CD8 lineage
  "FCGR3A","CD8", "Identity",
  "CD3D", "CD8", "Identity",
  "CD3E", "CD8", "Identity",
  "CD8A", "CD8", "Identity",
  "CD8B", "CD8", "Identity",
  "TRBC1","CD8", "Identity",
  "NCR1", "CD8", "Identity",

  # Cytotoxic
  "PRF1","Cytotoxic", "Function",
  "GZMB","Cytotoxic", "Function",
  "GNLY","Cytotoxic", "Function",
  "GZMH","Cytotoxic", "Function",
  "CCL5","Cytotoxic", "Function",
  "NKG7","Cytotoxic", "Function",
  "KLRG1","Cytotoxic", "Function",
  "GZMA","Cytotoxic", "Function",

  # Exhausted
  "PDCD1","Exhausted", "State",
  "LAG3","Exhausted", "State",
  "TOX","Exhausted", "State",
  "TIGIT","Exhausted", "State",
  "CD226","Exhausted", "State",
  "GZMK","Exhausted", "State",
  "HAVCR2","Exhausted", "State",
  "XCL1","Exhausted", "State",
  "XCL2","Exhausted", "State",
  "CD160","Exhausted", "State",

  # HLA
  "HLA-DRA","HLA", "Function",
  "HLA-DRB1","HLA", "Function",

  # IFN / ISG
  "IFNG","IFN", "Function",
  "IFIT2","IFN", "Function",
  "IFIT3","IFN", "Function",
```

####Visualization of manual signatures {.tabset}

##### Visualization of all signatures together {.tabset}

```{r CD4 Viz all signatures together}
selected_features <- signature_tbl %>%
  pull(feature) %>%
  unique()
  
m2 <- presto_markers %>%
  filter(feature %in% selected_features) %>%
  select(feature, group, avgExpr, pct_in) %>%
  left_join(signature_tbl, by = "feature") %>%
  mutate(signature_class = case_when(
  cell_type %in% c("CD4","CD8","Th1","Th2","Th17","Tfh","Treg") ~ "Identity",
  cell_type %in% c("Cytotoxic","IFN","Inflammatory","HLA") ~ "Function",
  cell_type %in% c("Naif","Memory","Activated","Exhausted",
                    "Resident","Prolif","Senescent","Apoptotic") ~ "State"
)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(cell_type)) %>%
  group_by(feature) %>%
  mutate(
    avgExpr = avgExpr - mean(avgExpr),
    avgExpr = scales::rescale(avgExpr, to = c(-2,2))
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(m2, 
       aes(x = feature,
               y = fct_reorder(as.character(group), group),
               color = avgExpr,
               size = pct_in)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_gradient2(low="blue", mid="white", high="red") +
  facet_wrap(~cell_type, scales="free", ncol=10) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45, hjust=1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(angle=45, hjust=1)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "LT Compartment - All Signatures",
    x = "Genes markers",
    y = "Clusters"
  )

dir.create(
   file.path(
     DIR_RESULT,
     "CD4_Tcells",
     "Annotation",
     "Manual"),
   recursive = TRUE,
   showWarnings = FALSE)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "CD4_Tcells",
    "Annotation",
    "Manual",
    "Marker_Signatures_LT_Compartment_All_Signatures.png"),
  width = 20, 
  height = 10)
```

##### View of specific signatures {.tabset}

```{r CD4 Viz specific signature}
m3 <- presto_markers %>%
  filter(feature %in% selected_features) %>%
  select(feature, group, avgExpr, pct_in) %>%
  left_join(signature_tbl, by = "feature") %>%
  filter(!is.na(cell_type)) %>%
  group_by(feature) %>%
  mutate(
    avgExpr = avgExpr - mean(avgExpr),
    avgExpr = scales::rescale(avgExpr, to = c(-2,2))
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

for (i in unique(m3$class)) {
  p <- ggplot(
    m3 %>% filter(class == i),
    aes(x=feature, y=fct_reorder(as.character(group), group), color = avgExpr, size = pct_in)) +
    geom_point()+
    scale_color_gradient2(low = "blue", mid="white",high = "red")+
    # theme_minimal() +
    facet_wrap(~ cell_type, scales = "free", ncol = 4) +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(angle=45, hjust=1), 
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45, hjust=1)) +
    labs(
    title = paste0("LT Compartment - ", i),
    x = "Genes markers",
    y = "Clusters")
  
  print(p)
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(
      DIR_RESULT,
      "CD4_Tcells",
      "Annotation",
      "Manual",
      paste0("Marker_Signatures_LT_Compartment_", i, ".png")),
    plot = p,
    width = 16,
    height = 8)
}
```

#### Module scores {.tabset}

##### Run {.tabset}

```{r CD4 Module score Run}
genes_Th1 <- c(
  "TBX21", "IFNG", "CXCR3", "STAT4",
  "IL12RB2", "CCL5", "CX3CR1")

gene_Th2 <- c(
  "GATA3", "CCR4", "IL4", 
  "IL5", "IL13")
  
genes_Th17 <- c(
  "RORC", "CCR6", "IL7R", "IL23R", "CCL20",
  "IL17A", "IL17F")

genes_Treg <- c(
  "FOXP3", "IL2RA", "CTLA4",
  "IKZF2", "TIGIT", "CD27", 
  "IL7R")

genes_Tfh <- c(
  "IL21", "CXCR5", "BCL6", 
  "PDCD1", "ICOS")

genes_Cytotox <- c(
  "GZMB", "GZMK", "PRF1",
  "NKG7", "GNLY", "GZMH",
  "CCL5", "KLRG1", "GZMA")

genes_Naif <- c(
  "CCR7", "SELL", "CD27",
  "CD28", "TCF7", "IL7R", "LEF1")

genes_Resident <- c(
  "CD69", "CXCR6", "NR4A2", "RUNX3")

genes_Exhausted <- c(
  "PDCD1", "LAG3", "TOX", "TIGIT",
  "CD226", "GZMK", "HAVCR2",
  "XCL1", "XCL2", "CD160")

genes_Memory <- c(
  "CD44", "PTPRC", "CCR7", "CD27", "CD28")

seu_CD4_QC_Moderate <- AddModuleScore(
  seu_CD4_QC_Moderate,
  features = list(
    Th1 = genes_Th1,
    Th2 = gene_Th2,
    Th17 = genes_Th17,
    Treg = genes_Treg,
    Cytotox = genes_Cytotox,
    Tfh = genes_Tfh,
    Naif = genes_Naif,
    Resident = genes_Resident,
    Exhausted = genes_Exhausted,
    Memory = genes_Memory),
  name = c("Th1_module_score", "Th2_module_score", "Th17_module_score", "Treg_module_score", "Cytotox_module_score", "Tfh_module_score", "Naif_module_score", "Resident_module_score", "Exhausted_module_score", "Memory_module_score"),
  assay = "RNA")

```

##### Visualize {.tabset}

```{r CD4 Module score Viz 1}
FeaturePlot(
  seu_CD4_QC_Moderate,
  features = c("Th1_module_score1", "Th2_module_score2", "Th17_module_score3", "Treg_module_score4", "Cytotox_module_score5", "Tfh_module_score6", "Naif_module_score7", "Resident_module_score8", "Exhausted_module_score9", "Memory_module_score10"),
  ncol = 5,
  order = TRUE)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "CD4_Tcells",
    "Annotation",
    "Manual",
    "Featureplot_Module_score.png"),
  width = 16,
  height = 8)
```

```{r CD4 Module score Viz 2}
VlnPlot(
  seu_CD4_QC_Moderate,
  cols = pal,
  features = c("Th1_module_score1", "Th2_module_score2", "Th17_module_score3", "Treg_module_score4", "Cytotox_module_score5", "Tfh_module_score6", "Naif_module_score7", "Resident_module_score8", "Exhausted_module_score9", "Memory_module_score10"),
  group.by = "seurat_clusters",
  pt.size = 0,
  ncol = 5)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "CD4_Tcells",
    "Annotation",
    "Manual",
    "Violinplot_Module_score.png"),
  width = 16,
  height = 8)
```

##### Z-scored

```{r CD4 Z-score module Run}
module_means <- seu_CD4_QC_Moderate@meta.data %>%
  group_by(seurat_clusters) %>%
  summarise(
    Th1 = mean(Th1_module_score1),
    Th2 = mean(Th2_module_score2),
    Th17 = mean(Th17_module_score3),
    Treg = mean(Treg_module_score4),
    Cytotox = mean(Cytotox_module_score5),
    Tfh = mean(Tfh_module_score6),
    Naif = mean(Naif_module_score7),
    Resident = mean(Resident_module_score8),
    Exhausted = mean(Exhausted_module_score9),
    Memory = mean(Memory_module_score10)
  )

module_z <- module_means %>%
  mutate(across(
    -seurat_clusters,
    ~ scale(.)[,1]))
```

```{r CD4 Z-score module Viz}
mat <- as.matrix(module_z[, -1])
rownames(mat) <- module_z$seurat_clusters

pheatmap <- pheatmap(
  mat,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  scale = "none")

ggsave(
  plot = pheatmap,
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "CD4_Tcells",
    "Annotation",
    "Manual",
    "Heatmap_Module_Score_Zscore.png"),
  width = 8,
  height = 6)

```

Useful to see which clusters have high scores for which modules, and to help with manual annotation of clusters based on their module score profiles. For example, a cluster with high Th1 module score and low Th17 and Treg module scores might be annotated as a Th1-like cluster, while a cluster with high Treg module score might be annotated as a Treg-like cluster.

Maybe useful too fuse some clusters together based on their module score profiles if they show similar profiles and are not well separated in the UMAP. For example, if two clusters both have high Th1 module scores and low Th17 and Treg module scores, they might represent different subsets of Th1-like cells and could be fused together into a single Th1-like cluster for downstream analyses.

Be careful we can compare clusters for a same signature but we can't compare scores between signatures because they are not on the same scale and are not directly comparable. The scores are relative to the expression of the genes in each signature and are not absolute measures of the underlying biology. Therefore, it's important to interpret the module scores in the context of each signature separately and not to compare scores across different signatures directly.

#### Choose manual annotations for each cluster {.tabset}

```{r CD4 Choose manual annot}
cluster_annotation_list <- list(
  "0" = "CD4_Naive_Tcm_(CD27+)",
  "1" = "CD4_EffectorMemory",
  "2" = "Stressed_Inflammed",
  "3" = "Treg_Memory",
  "4" = "CD4_Stem_CM",
  "5" = "CD4_Cytotox_IFN",
  "6" = "CD4_CentralMemory_Th1-primed", # A ENLEVER
  "7" = "CD4_effectorResident",
  "8" = "CD4_Activated_Resident-like", # A ENLEVER
  "9" = "CD8"
)

# Add annotations to Seurat object
seu_CD4_QC_Moderate$manual_annotation <- plyr::mapvalues(
  seu_CD4_QC_Moderate$seurat_clusters,
  from = names(cluster_annotation_list),
  to = unlist(cluster_annotation_list))
```

### Combine automatic and manual annotations {.tabset}

```{r CD4 Combine annot}
seu_CD4_QC_Moderate$consensus_annotation <- case_when(
  seu_CD4_QC_Moderate$seurat_clusters == "0" ~ "CD4_Naive",
  seu_CD4_QC_Moderate$seurat_clusters == "1" ~ "CD4_Effector_Th1/17_like",
  seu_CD4_QC_Moderate$seurat_clusters == "2" ~ "CD4_Effector_Stressed_Th2/Tfk_like",
  seu_CD4_QC_Moderate$seurat_clusters == "3" ~ "CD4_Treg_like",
  seu_CD4_QC_Moderate$seurat_clusters == "4" ~ "CD4_Naive_EarlyMemory",
  seu_CD4_QC_Moderate$seurat_clusters == "5" ~ "CD4_Temra-like",
  seu_CD4_QC_Moderate$seurat_clusters == "6" ~ "CD4_Naive_Th1_primed",
  seu_CD4_QC_Moderate$seurat_clusters == "7" ~ "CD4_Th1/17_like_Resident",
  seu_CD4_QC_Moderate$seurat_clusters == "8" ~ "CD4_Teffector_naive_resident",
  seu_CD4_QC_Moderate$seurat_clusters == "9" ~ "CD8",
  TRUE ~ "Uncertain"
)
```

Create a unique col with a consensus annotation between the annotations (automatic mine, automatic PPA, manual mine) to use for downstream analyses and visualization. For example, if the 3 annotations agree on a cell type for a given cluster, we can assign that cell type to the cells in that cluster. If there is disagreement between the annotations, we can assign a more general cell type or keep it as "Uncertain" until we can resolve the discrepancy with further analyses.

## Downstream Analysis

Answer biological questions based on the annotated clusters. For example, we can look at the distribution of cell types across conditions, identify differentially expressed genes between conditions within specific cell types, or perform pathway enrichment analyses to understand the functional differences between cell types.

In our context we have an interest for Tfh cells and BCL6 marker, so we can look at the distribution of Tfh cells across conditions, identify differentially expressed genes between conditions within the Tfh cluster(s), and perform pathway enrichment analyses to understand the functional differences between Tfh cells in different conditions.

### Proportion of cells across conditions {.tabset}

```{r CD4 Proportion of cells across conditions}
# See the proportions of cells in each condition
p_prop_celltypes_by_condition <-ggplot(
  seu_CD4_QC_Moderate@meta.data,
  aes(x = condition, fill = manual_annotation)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal) +
  labs(
    title = "Proportion of predicted cell types by condition",
    x = "Condition",
    y = "Proportion of cells"
  )
prop_celltypes_by_condition

dir.create(
  file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "CD4_Tcells",
    "Downstream_Analysis"),
  recursive = TRUE,
  showWarnings = FALSE)

ggsave(
  plot = p_prop_celltypes_by_condition, 
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "CD4_Tcells",
    "Downstream_Analysis",
    "Proportion_celltypes_by_condition.png"),
  width = 12,
  height = 6)

```

### BCL6 analysis {.tabset}

#### Basic Wilcoxon test {.tabset}

```{r BCL6 expression in Tfh cells}
# Identifier les cellules Tfh
Idents(seu_CD4_QC_Moderate) <- "seurat_clusters"

# Remplace "Tfh" par le nom ou numéro réel de ton cluster Tfh
tfh_cells <- WhichCells(seu_CD4_QC_Moderate, idents = "2")

# Extraire l'expression BCL6 pour ces cellules
expr_df <- FetchData(seu_CD4_QC_Moderate, vars = c("BCL6", "condition", "id", "source", "emulsion", "sample", "Phase"), cells = tfh_cells)

# Résumé au niveau sample
summary_sample <- expr_df %>%
  group_by(sample, source, condition) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_BCL6 = mean(BCL6),
    median_BCL6 = median(BCL6),
    n_cells = n(),
    pct_BCL6_positive = mean(BCL6 > 0) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(summary_sample)


# Visualisation
for (tissu in unique(summary_sample$source)) {
  df <- summary_sample %>% filter(source == tissu)
  
  stat_test <- df %>%
    rstatix::wilcox_test(pct_BCL6_positive ~ condition) %>%
    rstatix::adjust_pvalue(method = "BH") %>%
    rstatix::add_significance() %>% 
    mutate(y.position = max(df$pct_BCL6_positive) * 1.1)
  
  print(paste("Stat test for", tissu))
  print(stat_test)
  
  p_boxplot_bcl6_pct_source <- ggplot(df, aes(x = condition, y = pct_BCL6_positive)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
    geom_jitter(aes(color = condition), width = 0.15, size = 3) +
    ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(stat_test, label = "{p.adj.signif}\n(p.adj = {p})") +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.2))) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Percentage BCL6+ in Tfh-like cells -", tissu),
      y = "Percentage BCL6+ cells (per sample)",
      x = "Condition"
    ) +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
  print(p_boxplot_bcl6_pct_source)
  
  ggsave(
  plot = p_boxplot_bcl6_pct_source,
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "CD4_Tcells",
    "Downstream_Analysis",
    paste0("Percentage_BCL6+_Tfh_cells_by_condition_in_", tissu, ".png")),
  width = 8,
  height = 6)
}
```

Technically, we don't need to compute p.adj because we are only doing one test per tissue, but it's good practice to adjust for multiple testing when we have multiple tissues.

We will see now if MM patients have more BMMC cells thand HD in the Tfh-like cluster, because it could be that the increase in BCL6+ cells in MM is due to an increase in the proportion of Tfh-like cells that are BMMC rather than PBMC, and we want to see if there is an effect of the condition on the percentage of BCL6+ cells within each source (BMMC and PBMC) separately.

```{r}
# See if we have more cells in MM than HD in the Tfh-like cluster
summary_sample %>%
  group_by(sample, source, condition) %>%
  summarise(n_cells = sum(n_cells)) %>%
  ViolinPlot(., features = "BCL6", group.by = "condition", split.by = "source", pt.size = 0)
```

#### Linear model with covariates {.tabset}

```{r BCL6 linear model}
model <- lm(
  pct_BCL6_positive ~ condition * source, 
  data = summary_sample,
  weights = n_cells
)

summary(model)

```

```{r}
anova(model)

```


```{r Tfh global FeaturePlot}
FeaturePlot(seu_Tfh, features = "BCL6", split.by = "condition")
```

#### GSEA pseudo-bulk

```{r Tfh GSEA pseudo-bulk}
pb <- AggregateExpression(
  seu_Tfh,
  group.by = c("sample", "condition"),  # patient x condition
  assays = "RNA",
  slot = "counts"
)

counts <- pb$RNA
```

```{r}
library(edgeR)

meta <- data.frame(
  sample = colnames(counts),
  condition = ifelse(grepl("_HD$", colnames(counts)), "HD", "MM")
)
meta$condition <- factor(meta$condition, levels = c("HD","MM"))

dge <- DGEList(counts = counts)
dge <- calcNormFactors(dge)

design <- model.matrix(~ condition, meta)
dge <- estimateDisp(dge, design)
fit <- glmQLFit(dge, design)
res <- glmQLFTest(fit, coef = "conditionMM")

de <- topTags(res, n = Inf)$table

```

```{r}
gene_list <- sign(de$logFC) * -log10(de$PValue)
names(gene_list) <- rownames(de)
gene_list <- sort(gene_list, decreasing = TRUE)

```

```{r}
library(fgsea)
library(msigdbr)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# 1️⃣ Préparer les pathways Hallmark
msig <- msigdbr(species="Homo sapiens", category="H")
pathways <- msig %>% split(.$gene_symbol, .$gs_name)

# 2️⃣ Préparer geneList (named vector, trié décroissant)
# Exemple : gene_list <- c(GENE1=1.2, GENE2=-0.5, GENE3=2.1)
gene_list <- sort(gene_list, decreasing = TRUE)

# 3️⃣ GSEA avec fgsea
gsea_res <- fgsea(pathways = pathways, stats = gene_list)


# Filtrer les résultats significatifs
gsea_sig <- gsea_res %>% filter(padj < 0.05)

# 4️⃣ Visualisation dotplot simple
ggplot(gsea_sig %>% top_n(20, wt=NES), 
       aes(x=NES, y=reorder(pathway, NES), color=padj, size=size)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title="Top Hallmark pathways", x="NES", y=NULL)

# 5️⃣ Focus BCL6
bcl6_sets <- msig %>%
  filter(grepl("BCL6", gs_name, ignore.case = TRUE)) %>%
  split(.$gene_symbol, .$gs_name)

gsea_bcl6 <- fgsea(pathways = bcl6_sets,
                   stats = gene_list)

# GSEA plot pour un set BCL6
top_set <- names(bcl6_sets)[1]
plotEnrichment(bcl6_sets[[top_set]], gene_list) +
  labs(title = paste("BCL6 activity in Tfh:", top_set))

```
